svg.title: Egypt Job Market Scraper Pipeline Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing data flow from career pages through scraping, preprocessing, PostgreSQL storage, analysis, and Power BI dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Which companies use Greenhouse or Lever ATS?')
sendPrompt('What are custom career pages and how do we handle them?')
sendPrompt('How many companies are seeded from the Notion list?')
sendPrompt('How does Playwright handle JS-rendered career pages?')
sendPrompt('What scheduler should we use for the every-2-days scraping job?')
sendPrompt('What preprocessing steps are needed on raw job posting data?')
g.text: Dedup, normalize, tag new vs removed postings

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What schema should we use for the PostgreSQL job postings table?')
sendPrompt('What analysis and metrics should we surface for the Egyptian job market?')
g.text: Trend detection, skill frequency, role distribution

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do we connect PostgreSQL to Power BI for the dashboard?')
